overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through a rainy night in a historic gas-lit town. The character traverses muddy cobblestone streets lined with brick buildings, passing horse-drawn carriages and approaching a building with red signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden sidewalk transitioning to open street

events.description: character exits covered walkway into the open rainy street
horse-drawn carriage appears and moves along the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under a covered wooden walkway then stepping out onto the muddy street

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the cobblestone street from left to right

entered.detail: wooden roof structure of the covered sidewalk overhead
vertical wooden posts supporting the walkway roof
two-story brick building with arched windows and warm interior lighting
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light
elevated wooden plank walkway under the covered structure
wet cobblestone road surface with visible trolley tracks
wooden carriage with horses moving along the street

segments.scene_description: The character begins under a covered wooden walkway supported by thick pillars, then exits onto a muddy cobblestone street. A horse-drawn carriage moves along the street as the character steps out from under the shelter into the heavy rain, with gas lamps illuminating the brick buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy city street with trolley tracks and parked carts

events.description: second horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the muddy street passing wooden carts and approaching an illuminated building ahead

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving past the character on the right

entered.detail: large wooden wagon with wheels parked on the street side
large building with bright illuminated signage and marquee visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open muddy street with visible trolley tracks, the character passes a large wooden cart on the left. A horse-drawn carriage moves past on the right as the character approaches a brightly illuminated building facade in the distance, with rain continuing to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with illuminated theater and storefronts

events.description: approaching the brightly lit theater building increases ambient illumination

agents.ego_description: walking toward and then past the large illuminated theater building with bright signage

entered.detail: brightly lit entrance canopy of the theater with glowing lights
fabric awning over a shop entrance on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a grand theater building with a brightly illuminated marquee and signage, casting warm light onto the wet street. After passing the theater, the character continues down the commercial street lined with various storefronts and awnings as the rain persists.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection approach with parked carriage and plaza

events.description: street opens into a wider plaza and intersection area
briefly passing a seated man on a bench on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking through the open street approaching an intersection, passing a seated man on a wooden bench

notable_agents.action: man sitting on a wooden bench on the sidewalk, observing the street

entered.detail: tall enclosed wooden carriage with large wheels parked on the street side
wide open plaza area where multiple streets converge
wooden bench with a seated figure on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The street opens into a wider plaza area with a large wooden carriage parked on the left. The character passes a man sitting on a wooden bench and continues toward the intersection, with buildings lining both sides of the muddy cobblestone road.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza intersection with prominent corner building with red signage

events.description: character turns right toward the building with red signage

agents.ego_description: turning right toward a building with red signage while crossing the muddy plaza

notable_agents.action: person standing near the entrance of the building with red signage

entered.detail: two-story corner building with prominent red signage reading BASILICA and warm interior lighting
low wooden picket fence along the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character turns right in the open plaza toward a prominent corner building with bright red signage. Approaching the entrance, the building's warm lights contrast with the dark rainy night, while a figure stands near the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked frontier town, transitioning from the shelter of a wooden walkway to the open expanse of a brightly lit commercial plaza. It begins under a covered porch supported by thick pillars before the character steps out into heavy rain onto a muddy cobblestone street illuminated by gas lamps. As the camera moves forward past trolley tracks and horse-drawn carriages, the scene opens up toward a grand theater with a glowing marquee that casts a warm light across the wet pavement. The path then expands into a wider plaza, passing a man on a wooden bench and a parked carriage before turning toward a prominent corner building. Finally, the movement concludes as the character approaches the entrance of this building, where vivid red signage and warm interior lights contrast with the dark, rainy night.
